title: Special Positions in a Binary Matrix
titleCn: 二进制矩阵中的特殊位置

testcases.input: mat = [[1,0,0],[0,0,1],[1,0,0]] Output: 1 Explanation: (1, 2) is a special position because mat[1][2] == 1 and all other elements in row 1 and column 2 are 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: (1, 2) is a special position because mat[1][2] == 1 and all other elements in row 1 and column 2 are 0.
